heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSections 73 and 73a, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 73, acts , ; , ; , , specified time of election of members of the legislature.Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 537 Stat. 513Mar. 3, 1927, ch. 363, § 144 Stat. 1392Mar. 26, 1934, ch. 86, § 148 Stat. 465Section 73a, , , empowered legislature to change date of elections.act Mar. 26, 1934, ch. 86, § 448 Stat. 466
